name: Mecha External Corpus Expressive Distance & Non-Confusion Policy

signatures: V-fin antenna (especially dual yellow sweeping upward)
Tricolor scheme (white dominant, blue torso, red abdominal/waist, yellow vents/accents)
RX-78, Zaku, mobile suit specific nomenclatures
Anaheim Electronics, Zeon, Federation source identifiers

Purple and neon green color blocking (Unit-01)
